titleStmt.title: SII 38.554: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 554. (A.R. No. 554 of 1912.) TIRUNĪRMALAI, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPET DISTRICT. On the north wall of the Chakravarti-Tirumagaṉ shrine, Raṅganātha perumāḷ temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkravarttigaḷ Sundara Pāṇḍya Year 16: 1293 A.D.

summary.p: Ends of the lines are built in. This inscription is in the 12-13th century characters. It records an agreement among three parties i.e., 1) A merchant from Pammal, Kuṉṟam-uḍaiyāṉ Meiñānavittakan Tiruveṇkāḍu-uḍaiyāṉ, 2) the trustees (taṉattār) of the Nakkar nāyanār temple, 3) prince (piḷḷaiyār). Accordingly, both the merchant and the tāṉattār agreed to conduct several rituals and services i.e., the procession of the deity, perform offerings and worship in the temple in the months Paṅguni and Vaikāśi, supply various commodities for providing food offerings and articles for adorning both the god and goddess, out of the endowment, probably created by the prince.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6 vutu Uṭaiyār pammaṉakkar nāyaṉār koyil(ta) tāṉattāṟku pammali Irukkum viyāpārikaḷilk kuṉṟamuṭaiyāṉ meruñāṉa vittakaṉ tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāṉe tiruve
tirupavaṉikku tiruppaṅkuṉit tirunāḷukkum tiruvaikācit tirunāḷukkum melum kaṇun tirunāḷkaḷukkum tiruppavaṉikkuṟaivaṟuppukkup piḷḷaiyār tirumuṉpākat tāṉattāruṭaṉuṅkūṭa niccayittu nāṉupaiyaṅkoṇṭapaṭi
kku Arici tūṇippatakkum kaṟiamutukku vāḻaikkāy Aimpatum vaḻutalaikkāy Aimpatum teṅkāy Oṉṟum vāḻaippaḻam IruThe letter iru is found written above the line.pattum karuppukkaṭṭi vaṭṭu Irupatum miḷaku Amutu Uḻakkum Uppu Amutu nāḻiyum taiyi
ṉāḻiyum neyyi Amutu Uriyum viṟaku kaṭṭu Oṉṟum tirucceṅkaḻunirt tirumālai Oraṇaiyum tiruneṟṟimālai Oṉṟum tiruvirakkaḻal Oṉṟum tiruttaṭāpārattukku veḷḷaittoṭaiyum nācciyārkku veḷḷait tirumālai Oraṇaiyum tiru
Oṉṟum tiruvapiṣekattukku toṭaippūvum kaṟpūra veḷḷaiccāttuppaṭikkut tirumeṟpūccup patiṉkaḻañcum kaṟpūram Araikkaḻaiñcum Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku Irupatu veṟṟilai nāṟpatu cipātantāṅkuvārkkup paṇam Iraṇṭum tiruvi
Digital edition of SII 38.554 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
